values: This belongs to someone in the other settlement. I'd rather not explain how I got it
I came by this in a way that doesn't reflect well on me. It needs to go back
The person it belongs to doesn't know I have it. I'd like to keep it that way
I've had it for too long. The right thing to do is obvious. The doing is harder
It was taken from them and ended up in my hands. The details don't matter
Someone I trusted gave it to me. Turns out it wasn't theirs to give
I won it fairly. But the person I won it from didn't own it to begin with
It's been weighing on me. This isn't mine and I knew it the moment I accepted it
I found it, but I've since learned who lost it. Keeping it doesn't sit right
The rightful owner has been asking around for it. I can't keep pretending I don't know
I bought it cheap. Too cheap. Now I understand why
A trade went bad and I ended up holding something that was never part of the deal
I'd return it myself but there's history between us. It wouldn't go well
Someone dropped it in my workshop and I didn't speak up. That was months ago
I took it during an argument. The argument's over. The guilt isn't
It was left behind by someone in a hurry. I should have sent it back sooner
I can't face the person it belongs to. But someone should bring it to them
If I show up with it, there'll be questions I don't want to answer
Holding onto it has caused me nothing but trouble. It needs to go home
The family it belongs to has been looking for this. I've known where it was the whole time
I'd rather a stranger return it than explain to them why I had it
Someone will recognize it the moment you hand it over. Just don't mention my name
I owe them this. More than this, actually, but this is a start
It was given to me as payment for something I'm not proud of
Every time I look at it I think about the person missing it. Take it to them
I acquired it during a time when I wasn't making good decisions
The honest thing would be to return it in person. I'm not that brave
It ended up here through a chain of trades. The first link in that chain was theft
I know what it means to them. I know because I asked around, hoping it meant nothing
Just deliver it. If they ask who sent it, tell them someone who wants to make things right
